title: M3 Requirements Document - Expand Task Type and Complexity + Dashboard Migration
description: Comprehensive requirements document for M3 milestone including: Dashboard Migration to mcp-client-quest, agent-artist → agent-worker refactoring, shadow-agent-artist → shadow-agent-worker refactoring, DaemonAgent Generic Command System, Multi-Agent Workflow Scenarios (10+), and KĀDI Abilities Verification.
keyPoints: 6 major requirements with detailed acceptance criteria
Clear scope definition with out-of-scope items
reviewNotes:
Please review the requirements document and verify that:
1. All M3 requirements from DEVELOPMENT-PLAN.md are covered
2. Acceptance criteria are clear and testable
3. Non-functional requirements align with product.md and tech.md
4. Dependencies and risks are properly identified
5. Success criteria are achievable within 14 days
6. Out-of-scope items are appropriate for M3
